caption: A person's hands are shown interacting with sports trading cards on a red and black surface featuring the large red text "SPY". The setting includes a branded background with the text "JASPYS" and "CASEBREAKS.COM". In the initial sequence, a person holds a holographic trading card, which is then placed onto a black box labeled "OBSIDIAN". Throughout the scene, there are stacks of packaged trading cards nearby. Interspersed views show a man wearing a black shirt sitting at a desk in a room with equipment and shelves in the background, observing the process. As the action progresses, the person's hand reaches toward a different card resting on the "OBSIDIAN" box. The video alternates between close-up shots of the cards and wider shots of the person managing the break.
